model.label: GPT-5.2
model.description: OpenAI • Smaller GPT frontier model tuned for fast, cost-efficient reasoning and tool use.

pick.rationale: Nebraska is the clear pick based on a major efficiency gap: the Huskers rate top-20 nationally (KenPom #14, Torvik #19) with an elite defense, while Troy sits around the mid-140s on both systems with a below-average two-way profile. That defensive floor should travel well in a one-game setting and make it hard for Troy to generate enough efficient offense to keep pace. Troy’s upset path is mostly shooting/turnover variance, but Nebraska’s overall quality and stop-making ability make the favorite the much more likely advancer.

reasoningStep.title: South 4/13: Nebraska vs Troy
reasoningStep.summary: Nebraska advances due to a large two-way efficiency advantage, especially on defense, which reduces upset volatility.
evidence: Ratings: Nebraska KenPom #14 (AdjEM +26.12; AdjO 118.6 #55; AdjD 92.5) and Torvik #19 (AdjD rank 7).
Ratings: Troy KenPom #143 (AdjEM +1.74; AdjO #141; AdjD 109) and Torvik #142 (AdjO rank 136; AdjD rank 181).
Matchup logic: Nebraska’s elite defense provides a high floor in a one-game setting; Troy likely needs extreme shooting/turnover variance to win.

toolCalls.summary: Returned combined Torvik/KenPom ratings for 2 teams.

You have live tools. Use them before making a pick when they can reduce uncertainty.
